_doc: Per-location NOTABLE (location-exclusive) loot for build_location_loot.py. Most locations share a common artefact-equipment pool (generic, lives in World/Ground Loot); only a few have location-exclusive drops. A blueprint counts as notable for a location if it resolves to an item page AND spawns in <= exclusiveMaxLocations distinct locations. `locations` maps prefab roots to a wiki location slug (mint:true creates the entity). Chance is computed from the spawner set weights.
